   234→def _build_workflow_run_url(issue_url: str, run_id: str) -> str:
   235→    """Construct GitHub Actions workflow run URL from issue URL and run ID.
   236→
   237→    Args:
   238→        issue_url: GitHub issue URL (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123)
   239→        run_id: Workflow run ID
   240→
   241→    Returns:
   242→        Workflow run URL (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/actions/runs/1234567890)
   243→    """
   244→    owner_repo = extract_owner_repo_from_github_url(issue_url)
   245→    if owner_repo is not None:
   246→        owner, repo = owner_repo
   247→        return construct_workflow_run_url(owner, repo, run_id)
   248→    return f"https://github.com/actions/runs/{run_id}"

   251→def _strip_plan_markers(title: str) -> str:
   252→    """Strip '[erk-plan]' prefix and 'Plan:' prefix from issue title for use as PR title."""
   253→    result = title
   254→    # Strip "[erk-plan] " prefix if present
   255→    if result.startswith(ERK_PLAN_TITLE_PREFIX):
   256→        result = result[len(ERK_PLAN_TITLE_PREFIX) :]
   257→    # Strip "Plan: " prefix if present
   258→    if result.startswith(PLAN_HEADING_PREFIX):

   263→def _add_planned_prefix(title: str) -> str:

   266→    Args:
   267→        title: The PR title to prefix
   268→
   269→    Returns:
   270→        The title with 'plnd/' prefix, skipping if already prefixed
   271→    """
   272→    if title.startswith(PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX):
   273→        return title
   274→    return f"{PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX}{title}"

   282→        pr_number: PR number

   294→def _close_orphaned_draft_prs(
   295→    ctx: ErkContext,
   296→    repo_root: Path,
   297→    issue_number: int,
   298→    keep_pr_number: int,
   299→) -> list[int]:
   300→    """Close old draft PRs linked to an issue, keeping the specified one.
   301→
   302→    Returns list of PR numbers that were closed.
   303→    """
   304→    linked_prs = ctx.issues.get_prs_referencing_issue(repo_root, issue_number)
   305→
   306→    closed_prs: list[int] = []
   307→    for pr in linked_prs:
   308→        # Close orphaned drafts: draft PRs that are OPEN and not the one we just created
   309→        # Any draft PR linked to an erk-plan issue is fair game to close
   310→        if pr.is_draft and pr.state == "OPEN" and pr.number != keep_pr_number:
   311→            ctx.github.close_pr(repo_root, pr.number)
   312→            closed_prs.append(pr.number)
   313→
   314→    return closed_prs

   327→def _validate_draft_pr_for_submit(
   328→    ctx: ErkContext,
   329→    repo: RepoContext,
   330→    plan_number: int,
   331→) -> ValidatedDraftPR:
   332→    """Validate a draft PR plan for submission.
   333→
   334→    Fetches the PR, validates it has the erk-plan label and is OPEN.
   335→
   336→    Args:
   337→        ctx: ErkContext with git operations
   338→        repo: Repository context
   339→        plan_number: PR number to validate
   340→
   341→    Raises:
   342→        SystemExit: If PR doesn't exist, missing label, or not OPEN.
   343→    """
   344→    pr_result = ctx.github.get_pr(repo.root, plan_number)
   345→    if isinstance(pr_result, PRNotFound):
   346→        user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"PR #{plan_number} not found")
   347→        raise SystemExit(1)
   348→
   349→    # Validate: must have erk-plan label
   350→    if ERK_PLAN_LABEL not in pr_result.labels:
   351→        user_output(
   352→            click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
   353→            + f"PR #{plan_number} does not have {ERK_PLAN_LABEL} label\n\n"
   354→            "Cannot submit non-plan PRs for automated implementation."
   355→        )
   356→        raise SystemExit(1)
   357→
   358→    # Validate: must be OPEN
   359→    if pr_result.state != "OPEN":
   360→        user_output(
   361→            click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"PR #{plan_number} is {pr_result.state}\n\n"
   362→            "Cannot submit closed PRs for automated implementation."
   363→        )
   364→        raise SystemExit(1)
   365→
   366→    return ValidatedDraftPR(
   367→        number=plan_number,
   368→        title=pr_result.title,
   369→        url=pr_result.url,
   370→        branch_name=pr_result.head_ref_name,
   371→    )

   373→
   374→def _submit_draft_pr_plan(
   375→    ctx: ErkContext,
   376→    *,
   377→    repo: RepoContext,
   378→    validated: ValidatedDraftPR,
   379→    submitted_by: str,
   380→    original_branch: str,
   381→    base_branch: str,
   382→) -> SubmitResult:
   383→    """Submit a validated draft-PR plan for implementation.
   384→
   385→    For draft-PR plans, the branch and PR already exist. This function:
   386→    - Fetches and checks out the existing plan branch
   387→    - Creates .erk/impl-context/ with provider="github-draft-pr"
   388→    - Commits and pushes .erk/impl-context/ to existing branch
   389→    - Triggers the workflow with plan_backend="draft_pr"
   390→
   391→    Args:
   392→        ctx: ErkContext with git operations
   393→        repo: Repository context
   394→        validated: Validated draft PR information
   395→        submitted_by: GitHub username of submitter
   396→        original_branch: Original branch name (to restore after)
   397→        base_branch: Base branch for PR
   398→
   399→    Returns:
   400→        SubmitResult with URLs and identifiers.
   401→    """
   402→    plan_number = validated.number
   403→    branch_name = validated.branch_name
   404→
   405→    # Fetch plan content via PlanBackend
   406→    user_output("Fetching plan content...")
   407→    result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo.root, str(plan_number))
   408→    if isinstance(result, PlanNotFound):
   409→        user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"PR #{plan_number}: plan content not found")
   410→        raise SystemExit(1)
   411→    plan = result
   412→
   413→    # Fetch and checkout the existing plan branch
   414→    user_output(f"Checking out existing plan branch: {click.style(branch_name, fg='cyan')}")
   415→    ctx.git.remote.fetch_branch(repo.root, "origin", branch_name)
   416→
   417→    local_branches = ctx.git.branch.list_local_branches(repo.root)
   418→    if branch_name not in local_branches:
   419→        remote_ref = f"origin/{branch_name}"
   420→        ctx.branch_manager.create_tracking_branch(repo.root, branch_name, remote_ref)
   421→
   422→    ctx.branch_manager.checkout_branch(repo.root, branch_name)
   423→
   424→    # Sync local branch with remote (may be behind from prior submission or CI)
   425→    pull_result = ctx.git.remote.pull_rebase(repo.root, "origin", branch_name)
   426→    if isinstance(pull_result, PullRebaseError):
   427→        raise UserFacingCliError(
   428→            f"Failed to sync branch '{branch_name}' with remote: {pull_result.message}"
   429→        )
   430→
   431→    # Clean up previous .erk/impl-context/ if it exists (e.g., from a prior failed submission)
   432→    if impl_context_exists(repo.root):
   433→        user_output("Cleaning up previous .erk/impl-context/ folder...")
   434→        remove_impl_context(repo.root)
   435→
   436→    # Create .erk/impl-context/ with draft-PR provider
   437→    user_output("Creating .erk/impl-context/ folder...")
   438→    create_impl_context(
   439→        plan_content=plan.body,
   440→        plan_id=str(plan_number),
   441→        url=validated.url,
   442→        repo_root=repo.root,
   443→        provider="github-draft-pr",
   444→        objective_id=plan.objective_id,
   445→        now_iso=ctx.time.now().isoformat(),
   446→    )
   447→
   448→    # Stage, commit, and push
   449→    ctx.git.commit.stage_files(repo.root, [IMPL_CONTEXT_DIR])
   450→    ctx.git.commit.commit(repo.root, f"Add plan for PR #{plan_number}")
   451→    push_result = ctx.git.remote.push_to_remote(
   452→        repo.root, "origin", branch_name, set_upstream=False, force=False
   453→    )
   454→    if isinstance(push_result, PushError):
   455→        raise UserFacingCliError(push_result.message)
   456→    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Branch pushed to remote")
   457→
   458→    # Switch back to original branch
   459→    ctx.branch_manager.checkout_branch(repo.root, original_branch)
   460→
   461→    # Gather submission metadata
   462→    queued_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()
   463→
   464→    # Load workflow-specific config
   465→    workflow_config = load_workflow_config(repo.root, DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_NAME)
   466→
   467→    # Build inputs dict with plan_backend="draft_pr"
   468→    user_output("")
   469→    user_output(f"Triggering workflow: {click.style(DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_NAME, fg='cyan')}")
   470→
   471→    inputs = {
   472→        "plan_id": str(plan_number),
   473→        "submitted_by": submitted_by,
   474→        "plan_title": validated.title,
   475→        "branch_name": branch_name,
   476→        "pr_number": str(plan_number),
   477→        "base_branch": base_branch,
   478→        "plan_backend": "draft_pr",
   479→        **workflow_config,
   480→    }
   481→
   482→    run_id = ctx.github.trigger_workflow(
   483→        repo_root=repo.root,
   484→        workflow=DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_NAME,
   485→        inputs=inputs,
   486→    )
   487→    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Workflow triggered.")
   488→
   489→    # Compute workflow URL
   490→    workflow_url = _build_workflow_run_url(validated.url, run_id)
   491→
   492→    # Write dispatch metadata FIRST (before any PR body modification)
   493→    try:
   494→        write_dispatch_metadata(
   495→            plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend,
   496→            github=ctx.github,
   497→            repo_root=repo.root,
   498→            issue_number=plan_number,
   499→            run_id=run_id,
   500→            dispatched_at=queued_at,
   501→        )
   502→        user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Dispatch metadata written")
   503→    except Exception as e:
   504→        user_output(
   505→            click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + f"Failed to update dispatch metadata: {e}"
   506→        )
   507→
   508→    # Update PR body with workflow run link (best-effort)
   509→    # Guard: only append if body is non-empty to avoid overwriting metadata block
   510→    try:
   511→        pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr(repo.root, plan_number)
   512→        if not isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound) and pr_details.body:
   513→            updated_body = pr_details.body + f"\n\n**Workflow run:** {workflow_url}"
   514→            ctx.github.update_pr_body(repo.root, plan_number, updated_body)
   515→    except Exception as e:
   516→        logger.warning("Failed to update PR body with workflow run link: %s", e)
   517→
   518→    # Post queued event comment via PlanBackend
   519→    try:
   520→        validation_results = {
   521→            "pr_is_open": True,
   522→            "has_erk_plan_label": True,
   523→        }
   524→
   525→        metadata_block = create_submission_queued_block(
   526→            queued_at=queued_at,
   527→            submitted_by=submitted_by,
   528→            issue_number=plan_number,
   529→            validation_results=validation_results,
   530→            expected_workflow=DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_METADATA_NAME,
   531→        )
   532→
   533→        comment_body = render_erk_issue_event(
   534→            title="🔄 Plan Queued for Implementation",
   535→            metadata=metadata_block,
   536→            description=(
   537→                f"Plan submitted by **{submitted_by}** at {queued_at}.\n\n"
   538→                f"The `{DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_METADATA_NAME}` workflow has been "
   539→                f"triggered via direct dispatch.\n\n"
   540→                f"**Workflow run:** {workflow_url}"
   541→            ),
   542→        )
   543→
   544→        user_output("Posting queued event comment...")
   545→        ctx.plan_backend.add_comment(repo.root, str(plan_number), comment_body)
   546→        user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Queued event comment posted")
   547→    except Exception as e:
   548→        user_output(
   549→            click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow")
   550→            + f"Failed to post queued comment: {e}\n"
   551→            + "Workflow is already running."
   552→        )
   553→
   554→    pr_url = _build_pr_url(validated.url, plan_number)
   555→
   556→    return SubmitResult(
   557→        issue_number=plan_number,
   558→        issue_title=validated.title,
   559→        issue_url=validated.url,
   560→        pr_number=plan_number,
   561→        pr_url=pr_url,
   562→        workflow_run_id=run_id,
   563→        workflow_url=workflow_url,
   564→    )
   565→
   566→
   567→def _validate_issue_for_submit(
   568→    ctx: ErkContext,
   569→    repo: RepoContext,
   570→    issue_number: int,
   571→    base_branch: str,
   572→    *,
   573→    force: bool,
   574→) -> ValidatedIssue:
   575→    """Validate a single issue for submission.
   576→
   577→    Fetches the issue, validates constraints, derives branch name, and checks
   578→    if branch/PR already exist.
   579→
   580→    Args:
   581→        ctx: ErkContext with git operations
   582→        repo: Repository context
   583→        issue_number: GitHub issue number to validate
   584→        base_branch: Base branch for PR (trunk or custom feature branch)
   585→
   586→    Raises:
   587→        SystemExit: If issue doesn't exist, missing label, or closed.
   588→    """
   589→    # Fetch issue from GitHub
   590→    issue = ctx.issues.get_issue(repo.root, issue_number)
   591→    if isinstance(issue, IssueNotFound):
   592→        user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Issue #{issue.issue_number} not found")
   593→        raise SystemExit(1)
   594→
   595→    # Validate: must have erk-plan label
   596→    if ERK_PLAN_LABEL not in issue.labels:
   597→        user_output(
   598→            click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
   599→            + f"Issue #{issue_number} does not have {ERK_PLAN_LABEL} label\n\n"
   600→            "Cannot submit non-plan issues for automated implementation.\n"
   601→            "To create a plan, use Plan Mode then /erk:plan-save"
   602→        )
   603→        raise SystemExit(1)
   604→
   605→    # Validate: must be OPEN
   606→    if issue.state != "OPEN":
   607→        user_output(
   608→            click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Issue #{issue_number} is {issue.state}\n\n"
   609→            "Cannot submit closed issues for automated implementation."
   610→        )
   611→        raise SystemExit(1)
   612→
   613→    # Use provided base_branch instead of detecting trunk
   614→    logger.debug("base_branch=%s", base_branch)
   615→
   616→    # Check for existing local branches BEFORE computing new name
   617→    existing_branches = _find_existing_branches_for_issue(ctx, repo.root, issue_number)
   618→
   619→    # Compute branch name using canonical naming function
   620→    objective_id_raw = ctx.plan_backend.get_metadata_field(
   621→        repo.root, str(issue_number), "objective_issue"
   622→    )
   623→    objective_id: int | None = None
   624→    if isinstance(objective_id_raw, int):
   625→        objective_id = objective_id_raw
   626→    elif isinstance(objective_id_raw, str) and objective_id_raw.isdigit():
   627→        objective_id = int(objective_id_raw)
   628→    slug = generate_slug_or_fallback(ctx.prompt_executor, issue.title)
   629→    new_branch_name = generate_issue_branch_name(
   630→        issue_number, slug, ctx.time.now(), objective_id=objective_id
   631→    )
   632→
   633→    if existing_branches:
   634→        chosen = _prompt_existing_branch_action(
   635→            ctx, repo.root, existing_branches, new_branch_name, force=force
   636→        )
   637→        branch_name = chosen if chosen is not None else new_branch_name
   638→    else:
   639→        branch_name = new_branch_name
   640→
   641→    logger.debug("branch_name=%s", branch_name)
   642→    user_output(f"Computed branch: {click.style(branch_name, fg='cyan')}")
   643→
   644→    # Check if branch already exists on remote and has a PR
   645→    branch_exists = ctx.git.branch.branch_exists_on_remote(repo.root, "origin", branch_name)
   646→    logger.debug("branch_exists_on_remote(%s)=%s", branch_name, branch_exists)
   647→
   648→    pr_number: int | None = None
   649→    if branch_exists:
   650→        pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(repo.root, branch_name)
   651→        if not isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound):
   652→            pr_number = pr_details.number
   653→
   654→    # Check if this issue is a learn plan
   655→    is_learn_origin = is_issue_learn_plan(issue.labels)
   656→
   657→    return ValidatedIssue(
   658→        number=issue_number,
   659→        issue=issue,
   660→        branch_name=branch_name,
   661→        branch_exists=branch_exists,
   662→        pr_number=pr_number,
   663→        is_learn_origin=is_learn_origin,
   664→    )
   665→
   666→
   667→def _create_branch_and_pr(
   668→    ctx: ErkContext,
   669→    *,
   670→    repo: RepoContext,
   671→    validated: ValidatedIssue,
   672→    branch_name: str,
   673→    base_branch: str,
   674→    submitted_by: str,
   675→    original_branch: str,
   676→) -> int:
   677→    """Create branch, commit, push, and create draft PR.
   678→
   679→    Uses git plumbing to commit plan files directly to the branch without
   680→    checking it out. The Graphite linking step performs a targeted checkout
   681→    only when Graphite is enabled.
   682→
   683→    Args:
   684→        ctx: ErkContext with git operations
   685→        repo: Repository context
   686→        validated: Validated issue information
   687→        branch_name: Name of branch to create
   688→        base_branch: Base branch for PR
   689→        submitted_by: GitHub username of submitter
   690→        original_branch: Original branch name (for Graphite checkout restore)
   691→
   692→    Returns:
   693→        PR number of the created draft PR.
   694→    """
   695→    issue = validated.issue
   696→    issue_number = validated.number
   697→
   698→    # Get plan content and build impl-context files in memory
   699→    user_output("Fetching plan content...")
   700→    result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo.root, str(issue_number))
   701→    if isinstance(result, PlanNotFound):
   702→        user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Issue #{issue_number} not found")
   703→        raise SystemExit(1)
   704→    plan = result
   705→
   706→    # Commit impl-context files directly to branch (no checkout required)
   707→    user_output("Committing plan to branch...")
   708→    files = build_impl_context_files(
   709→        plan_content=plan.body,
   710→        plan_id=str(issue_number),
   711→        url=issue.url,
   712→        provider="github",
   713→        objective_id=plan.objective_id,
   714→        now_iso=ctx.time.now().isoformat(),
   715→    )
   716→    ctx.git.commit.commit_files_to_branch(
   717→        repo.root,
   718→        branch=branch_name,
   719→        files=files,
   720→        message=f"Add plan for issue #{issue_number}",
   721→    )
   722→    push_result = ctx.git.remote.push_to_remote(
   723→        repo.root, "origin", branch_name, set_upstream=True, force=False
   724→    )
   725→    if isinstance(push_result, PushError):
   726→        raise UserFacingCliError(push_result.message)
   727→    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Branch pushed to remote")
   728→
   729→    # Create draft PR
   730→    # IMPORTANT: "Closes owner/repo#N" (cross-repo) or "Closes #N" (same-repo)
   731→    # MUST be in the initial body passed to create_pr(), NOT added via update.
   732→    # GitHub's willCloseTarget API field is set at PR creation time and is NOT
   733→    # updated when the body is edited afterward.
   734→    user_output("Creating draft PR...")
   735→    plans_repo = ctx.local_config.plans_repo if ctx.local_config else None
   736→    issue_ref = _format_issue_ref(issue_number, plans_repo)
   737→    pr_body = (
   738→        f"**Author:** @{submitted_by}\n"
   739→        f"**Status:** Queued for implementation\n\n"
   740→        f"This PR will be marked ready for review after implementation completes.\n\n"
   741→        f"## Implementation Plan\n\n"
   742→        f"<details>\n"
   743→        f"<summary><strong>Implementation Plan</strong> (Issue #{issue_number})</summary>\n\n"
   744→        f"{plan.body}\n\n"
   745→        f"</details>\n\n"
   746→        f"**Plan:** {issue_ref}\n\n"
   747→        f"---\n\n"
   748→        f"Closes {issue_ref}"
   749→    )
   750→    pr_title = _add_planned_prefix(_strip_plan_markers(issue.title))
   751→    pr_number = ctx.github.create_pr(
   752→        repo_root=repo.root,
   753→        branch=branch_name,
   754→        title=pr_title,
   755→        body=pr_body,
   756→        base=base_branch,
   757→        draft=True,
   758→    )
   759→    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + f" Draft PR #{pr_number} created")
   760→
   761→    # Update PR body with checkout command footer
   762→    footer = build_pr_body_footer(
   763→        pr_number=pr_number, issue_number=issue_number, plans_repo=plans_repo
   764→    )
   765→    ctx.github.update_pr_body(repo.root, pr_number, pr_body + footer)
   766→
   767→    # Add extraction skip label if this is a learn plan
   768→    if validated.is_learn_origin:
   769→        ctx.github.add_label_to_pr(repo.root, pr_number, ERK_SKIP_LEARN_LABEL)
   770→        # FUTURE ENHANCEMENT: When a learn plan issue gets a PR, update the parent
   771→        # plan's learn_status from "completed_with_plan" to track the PR number.
   772→        # Currently, the parent only gets updated when the learn plan's PR lands
   773→        # (in land_cmd._update_parent_learn_status_if_learn_plan). Adding an
   774→        # intermediate state here would let the TUI show the PR number (e.g.,
   775→        # "🚧 #5514") instead of the learn plan issue number (e.g., "#5508")
   776→        # while the PR is still in review.
   777→        # See: LearnStatusValue in erk_shared/github/metadata/schemas.py
   778→
   779→    # Link PR with Graphite (if enabled) using a targeted checkout scope
   780→    if ctx.branch_manager.is_graphite_managed():
   781→        user_output("Linking PR with Graphite...")
   782→        ctx.branch_manager.checkout_branch(repo.root, branch_name)
   783→        submit_result = ctx.branch_manager.submit_branch(repo.root, branch_name)
   784→        ctx.branch_manager.checkout_branch(repo.root, original_branch)
   785→        if isinstance(submit_result, SubmitBranchError):
   786→            user_output(
   787→                click.style("✗", fg="red")
   788→                + f" Failed to link PR with Graphite: {submit_result.message}"
   789→            )
   790→        else:
   791→            user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " PR linked with Graphite")
   792→
   793→    # Close any orphaned draft PRs for this issue
   794→    closed_prs = _close_orphaned_draft_prs(ctx, repo.root, issue_number, pr_number)
   795→    if closed_prs:
   796→        user_output(
   797→            click.style("✓", fg="green")
   798→            + f" Closed {len(closed_prs)} orphaned draft PR(s): "
   799→            + ", ".join(f"#{n}" for n in closed_prs)
   800→        )
   801→
   802→    return pr_number
   803→
   804→
   805→def _submit_single_issue(
   806→    ctx: ErkContext,
   807→    *,
   808→    repo: RepoContext,
   809→    validated: ValidatedIssue,
   810→    submitted_by: str,
   811→    original_branch: str,
   812→    base_branch: str,
   813→) -> SubmitResult:
   814→    """Submit a single validated issue for implementation.
   815→
   816→    Creates branch/PR if needed and triggers workflow.
   817→
   818→    Args:
   819→        ctx: ErkContext with git operations
   820→        repo: Repository context
   821→        validated: Validated issue information
   822→        submitted_by: GitHub username of submitter
   823→        original_branch: Original branch name (to restore after)
   824→        base_branch: Base branch for PR (trunk or custom feature branch)
   825→
   826→    Returns:
   827→        SubmitResult with URLs and identifiers.
   828→    """
   829→    issue = validated.issue
   830→    issue_number = validated.number
   831→    branch_name = validated.branch_name
   832→    branch_exists = validated.branch_exists
   833→    pr_number = validated.pr_number
   834→
   835→    if branch_exists:
   836→        if pr_number is not None:
   837→            user_output(
   838→                f"PR #{pr_number} already exists for branch '{branch_name}' (state: existing)"
   839→            )
   840→            user_output("Skipping branch/PR creation, triggering workflow...")
   841→        else:
   842→            # Branch exists but no PR - need to add a commit for PR creation
   843→            user_output(f"Branch '{branch_name}' exists but no PR. Adding placeholder commit...")
   844→
   845→            # Fetch the remote branch locally (no checkout needed)
   846→            ctx.git.remote.fetch_branch(repo.root, "origin", branch_name)
   847→
   848→            # Only create tracking branch if it doesn't exist locally (LBYL)
   849→            local_branches = ctx.git.branch.list_local_branches(repo.root)
   850→            if branch_name not in local_branches:
   851→                remote_ref = f"origin/{branch_name}"
   852→                ctx.branch_manager.create_tracking_branch(repo.root, branch_name, remote_ref)
   853→
   854→            # Create empty commit as placeholder for PR creation (no checkout required)
   855→            ctx.git.commit.commit_files_to_branch(
   856→                repo.root,
   857→                branch=branch_name,
   858→                files={},
   859→                message=f"[erk-plan] Initialize implementation for issue #{issue_number}",
   860→            )
   861→            push_result = ctx.git.remote.push_to_remote(
   862→                repo.root, "origin", branch_name, set_upstream=False, force=False
   863→            )
   864→            if isinstance(push_result, PushError):
   865→                raise UserFacingCliError(push_result.message)
   866→            user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Placeholder commit pushed")
   867→
   868→            # Now create the PR
   869→            # IMPORTANT: "Closes owner/repo#N" (cross-repo) or "Closes #N" (same-repo)
   870→            # MUST be in the initial body passed to create_pr(), NOT added via update.
   871→            # GitHub's willCloseTarget API field is set at PR creation time and is NOT
   872→            # updated when the body is edited afterward.
   873→            plans_repo = ctx.local_config.plans_repo if ctx.local_config else None
   874→            issue_ref = _format_issue_ref(issue_number, plans_repo)
   875→            pr_body = (
   876→                f"**Author:** @{submitted_by}\n"
   877→                f"**Status:** Queued for implementation\n\n"
   878→                f"This PR will be marked ready for review after implementation completes.\n\n"
   879→                f"**Plan:** {issue_ref}\n\n"
   880→                f"---\n\n"
   881→                f"Closes {issue_ref}"
   882→            )
   883→            pr_title = _add_planned_prefix(_strip_plan_markers(issue.title))
   884→            pr_number = ctx.github.create_pr(
   885→                repo_root=repo.root,
   886→                branch=branch_name,
   887→                title=pr_title,
   888→                body=pr_body,
   889→                base=base_branch,
   890→                draft=True,
   891→            )
   892→            user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + f" Draft PR #{pr_number} created")
   893→
   894→            # Update PR body with checkout command footer
   895→            footer = build_pr_body_footer(
   896→                pr_number=pr_number, issue_number=issue_number, plans_repo=plans_repo
   897→            )
   898→            ctx.github.update_pr_body(repo.root, pr_number, pr_body + footer)
   899→
   900→            # Add extraction skip label if this is a learn plan
   901→            if validated.is_learn_origin:
   902→                ctx.github.add_label_to_pr(repo.root, pr_number, ERK_SKIP_LEARN_LABEL)
   903→                # FUTURE ENHANCEMENT: See comment in _create_branch_and_pr for
   904→                # updating parent plan's learn_status when learn plan gets a PR.
   905→
   906→            # Link PR with Graphite (if enabled) using a targeted checkout scope
   907→            if ctx.branch_manager.is_graphite_managed():
   908→                user_output("Linking PR with Graphite...")
   909→                ctx.branch_manager.checkout_branch(repo.root, branch_name)
   910→                submit_result = ctx.branch_manager.submit_branch(repo.root, branch_name)
   911→                ctx.branch_manager.checkout_branch(repo.root, original_branch)
   912→                if isinstance(submit_result, SubmitBranchError):
   913→                    user_output(
   914→                        click.style("✗", fg="red")
   915→                        + f" Failed to link PR with Graphite: {submit_result.message}"
   916→                    )
   917→                else:
   918→                    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " PR linked with Graphite")
   919→
   920→            # Close any orphaned draft PRs
   921→            closed_prs = _close_orphaned_draft_prs(ctx, repo.root, issue_number, pr_number)
   922→            if closed_prs:
   923→                user_output(
   924→                    click.style("✓", fg="green")
   925→                    + f" Closed {len(closed_prs)} orphaned draft PR(s): "
   926→                    + ", ".join(f"#{n}" for n in closed_prs)
   927→                )
   928→    else:
   929→        # Check if branch exists locally (user chose to reuse existing)
   930→        local_branches = ctx.git.branch.list_local_branches(repo.root)
   931→        branch_exists_locally = branch_name in local_branches
   932→
   933→        if branch_exists_locally:
   934→            # Reuse existing local branch
   935→            user_output(f"Using existing local branch: {click.style(branch_name, fg='cyan')}")
   936→
   937→            # Track in Graphite if not already tracked
   938→            if ctx.branch_manager.is_graphite_managed():
   939→                if not ctx.graphite.is_branch_tracked(repo.root, branch_name):
   940→                    ctx.branch_manager.track_branch(repo.root, branch_name, base_branch)
   941→                    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Branch tracked in Graphite")
   942→
   943→            pr_number = _create_branch_and_pr(
   944→                ctx=ctx,
   945→                repo=repo,
   946→                validated=validated,
   947→                branch_name=branch_name,
   948→                base_branch=base_branch,
   949→                submitted_by=submitted_by,
   950→                original_branch=original_branch,
   951→            )
   952→        else:
   953→            # Create new branch
   954→            user_output(f"Creating branch from origin/{base_branch}...")
   955→            ctx.git.remote.fetch_branch(repo.root, "origin", base_branch)
   956→
   957→            # Verify parent is tracked by Graphite (if enabled)
   958→            if ctx.branch_manager.is_graphite_managed():
   959→                parent_branch = base_branch.removeprefix("origin/")
   960→                if not ctx.graphite.is_branch_tracked(repo.root, parent_branch):
   961→                    msg = (
   962→                        f"Cannot stack on branch '{parent_branch}' - "
   963→                        f"it's not tracked by Graphite.\n\n"
   964→                        f"To fix this:\n"
   965→                        f"  1. gt checkout {parent_branch}\n"
   966→                        f"  2. gt track --parent <parent-branch>\n\n"
   967→                        f"Then retry your command."
   968→                    )
   969→                    user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + msg)
   970→                    raise SystemExit(1)
   971→
   972→            create_result = ctx.branch_manager.create_branch(
   973→                repo.root, branch_name, f"origin/{base_branch}"
   974→            )
   975→            if isinstance(create_result, BranchAlreadyExists):
   976→                user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + create_result.message)
   977→                raise SystemExit(1) from None
   978→            user_output(f"Created branch: {click.style(branch_name, fg='cyan')}")
   979→
   980→            pr_number = _create_branch_and_pr(
   981→                ctx=ctx,
   982→                repo=repo,
   983→                validated=validated,
   984→                branch_name=branch_name,
   985→                base_branch=base_branch,
   986→                submitted_by=submitted_by,
   987→                original_branch=original_branch,
   988→            )
   989→
   990→    # Gather submission metadata
   991→    queued_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()
   992→
   993→    # Validate pr_number is set before workflow dispatch
   994→    if pr_number is None:
   995→        user_output(
   996→            click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
   997→            + "Failed to create or find PR. Cannot trigger workflow."
   998→        )
   999→        raise SystemExit(1)
  1000→
  1001→    # Load workflow-specific config
  1002→    workflow_config = load_workflow_config(repo.root, DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_NAME)
  1003→
  1004→    # Trigger workflow via direct dispatch
  1005→    user_output("")
  1006→    user_output(f"Triggering workflow: {click.style(DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_NAME, fg='cyan')}")
  1007→    user_output(f"  Display name: {DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_METADATA_NAME}")
  1008→
  1009→    # Build inputs dict, merging workflow config
  1010→    inputs = {
  1011→        # Required inputs (always passed)
  1012→        "plan_id": str(issue_number),
  1013→        "submitted_by": submitted_by,
  1014→        "plan_title": issue.title,
  1015→        "branch_name": branch_name,
  1016→        "pr_number": str(pr_number),
  1017→        "base_branch": base_branch,
  1018→        # Config-based inputs (from .erk/workflows/)
  1019→        **workflow_config,
  1020→    }
  1021→
  1022→    run_id = ctx.github.trigger_workflow(
  1023→        repo_root=repo.root,
  1024→        workflow=DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_NAME,
  1025→        inputs=inputs,
  1026→    )
  1027→    user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Workflow triggered.")
  1028→
  1029→    # Compute workflow URL once (used for PR body update, queued comment, and result)
  1030→    workflow_url = _build_workflow_run_url(issue.url, run_id)
  1031→
  1032→    # Update PR body with workflow run link (best-effort)
  1033→    try:
  1034→        pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr(repo.root, pr_number)
  1035→        if not isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound):
  1036→            updated_body = pr_details.body + f"\n\n**Workflow run:** {workflow_url}"
  1037→            ctx.github.update_pr_body(repo.root, pr_number, updated_body)
  1038→    except Exception as e:
  1039→        logger.warning("Failed to update PR body with workflow run link: %s", e)
  1040→
  1041→    # Write dispatch metadata synchronously to fix race condition with erk dash
  1042→    # This ensures the issue body has the run info before we return to the user
  1043→    try:
  1044→        write_dispatch_metadata(
  1045→            plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend,
  1046→            github=ctx.github,
  1047→            repo_root=repo.root,
  1048→            issue_number=issue_number,
  1049→            run_id=run_id,
  1050→            dispatched_at=queued_at,
  1051→        )
  1052→        user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Dispatch metadata written to issue")
  1053→    except Exception as e:
  1054→        # Log warning but don't block - workflow is already triggered
  1055→        user_output(
  1056→            click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + f"Failed to update dispatch metadata: {e}"
  1057→        )
  1058→
  1059→    validation_results = {
  1060→        "issue_is_open": True,
  1061→        "has_erk_plan_label": True,
  1062→    }
  1063→
  1064→    # Create and post queued event comment
  1065→    try:
  1066→        metadata_block = create_submission_queued_block(
  1067→            queued_at=queued_at,
  1068→            submitted_by=submitted_by,
  1069→            issue_number=issue_number,
  1070→            validation_results=validation_results,
  1071→            expected_workflow=DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_METADATA_NAME,
  1072→        )
  1073→
  1074→        comment_body = render_erk_issue_event(
  1075→            title="🔄 Issue Queued for Implementation",
  1076→            metadata=metadata_block,
  1077→            description=(
  1078→                f"Issue submitted by **{submitted_by}** at {queued_at}.\n\n"
  1079→                f"The `{DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_METADATA_NAME}` workflow has been "
  1080→                f"triggered via direct dispatch.\n\n"
  1081→                f"**Workflow run:** {workflow_url}\n\n"
  1082→                f"Branch and draft PR were created locally for correct commit attribution."
  1083→            ),
  1084→        )
  1085→
  1086→        user_output("Posting queued event comment...")
  1087→        ctx.issues.add_comment(repo.root, issue_number, comment_body)
  1088→        user_output(click.style("✓", fg="green") + " Queued event comment posted")
  1089→    except Exception as e:
  1090→        # Log warning but don't block - workflow is already triggered
  1091→        user_output(
  1092→            click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow")
  1093→            + f"Failed to post queued comment: {e}\n"
  1094→            + "Workflow is already running."
  1095→        )
  1096→
  1097→    pr_url = _build_pr_url(issue.url, pr_number) if pr_number else None
  1098→
  1099→    return SubmitResult(
  1100→        issue_number=issue_number,
  1101→        issue_title=issue.title,
  1102→        issue_url=issue.url,
  1103→        pr_number=pr_number,
  1104→        pr_url=pr_url,
  1105→        workflow_run_id=run_id,
  1106→        workflow_url=workflow_url,
  1107→    )

  1110→@click.command("submit")
  1111→@click.argument("issue_numbers", type=int, nargs=-1, required=True)
  1112→@click.option(
  1113→    "--base",
  1114→    type=str,
  1115→    default=None,
  1116→    help="Base branch for PR (defaults to current branch).",
  1117→)
  1118→@click.option(
  1119→    "-f",
  1120→    "--force",
  1121→    is_flag=True,
  1122→    help="Delete existing branches and create fresh without prompting.",
  1123→)
  1124→@click.pass_obj
  1125→def submit_cmd(
  1126→    ctx: ErkContext, issue_numbers: tuple[int, ...], base: str | None, force: bool
  1127→) -> None:
  1128→    """Submit issues for remote AI implementation via GitHub Actions.
  1129→
  1130→    Creates branch and draft PR locally (for correct commit attribution),
  1131→    then triggers the dispatch-erk-queue.yml GitHub Actions workflow.
  1132→
  1133→    Arguments:
  1134→        ISSUE_NUMBERS: One or more GitHub issue numbers to submit
  1135→
  1136→    Example:
  1137→        erk plan submit 123
  1138→        erk plan submit 123 456 789
  1139→        erk plan submit 123 --base master
  1140→
  1141→    Requires:
  1142→        - All issues must have erk-plan label
  1143→        - All issues must be OPEN
  1144→        - Working directory must be clean (no uncommitted changes)
  1145→    """
  1146→    # Validate GitHub CLI prerequisites upfront (LBYL)
  1147→    Ensure.gh_authenticated(ctx)
  1148→
  1149→    # Get repository context
  1150→    if isinstance(ctx.repo, RepoContext):
  1151→        repo = ctx.repo
  1152→    else:
  1153→        repo = discover_repo_context(ctx, ctx.cwd)
  1154→
  1155→    # Ensure trunk is synced before any operations
  1156→    ensure_trunk_synced(ctx, repo)
  1157→
  1158→    # Save current state (needed for both default base and restoration)
  1159→    original_branch = ctx.git.branch.get_current_branch(repo.root)
  1160→    if original_branch is None:
  1161→        user_output(
  1162→            click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
  1163→            + "Not on a branch (detached HEAD state). Cannot submit from here."
  1164→        )
  1165→        raise SystemExit(1)
  1166→
  1167→    # Validate base branch if provided, otherwise default to current branch (LBYL)
  1168→    if base is not None:
  1169→        if not ctx.git.branch.branch_exists_on_remote(repo.root, "origin", base):
  1170→            user_output(
  1171→                click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Base branch '{base}' does not exist on remote"
  1172→            )
  1173→            raise SystemExit(1)
  1174→        target_branch = base
  1175→    else:
  1176→        # If on a placeholder branch (local-only), use trunk as base
  1177→        if is_placeholder_branch(original_branch):
  1178→            target_branch = ctx.git.branch.detect_trunk_branch(repo.root)
  1179→        elif not ctx.git.branch.branch_exists_on_remote(repo.root, "origin", original_branch):
  1180→            # Current branch not pushed to remote - fall back to trunk
  1181→            target_branch = ctx.git.branch.detect_trunk_branch(repo.root)
  1182→        else:
  1183→            target_branch = original_branch
  1184→
  1185→    # For single-issue learn plan submissions, auto-detect parent branch
  1186→    issue_number = issue_numbers[0] if len(issue_numbers) == 1 else None
  1187→    if (
  1188→        issue_number is not None
  1189→        and base is None
  1190→        and ctx.issues.issue_exists(repo.root, issue_number)
  1191→    ):
  1192→        issue = ctx.issues.get_issue(repo.root, issue_number)
  1193→        # issue_exists check above ensures this won't be IssueNotFound
  1194→        if not isinstance(issue, IssueNotFound) and is_issue_learn_plan(issue.labels):
  1195→            parent_branch = get_learn_plan_parent_branch(ctx, repo.root, str(issue_number))
  1196→            if parent_branch is not None and ctx.git.branch.branch_exists_on_remote(
  1197→                repo.root, "origin", parent_branch
  1198→            ):
  1199→                target_branch = parent_branch
  1200→                user_output(
  1201→                    f"Learn plan detected, stacking on parent branch: "
  1202→                    f"{click.style(parent_branch, fg='cyan')}"
  1203→                )
  1204→            elif parent_branch is not None:
  1205→                user_output(
  1206→                    click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow")
  1207→                    + f"Parent branch '{parent_branch}' not on remote, using trunk"
  1208→                )
  1209→
  1210→    # Get GitHub username (authentication already validated)
  1211→    _, username, _ = ctx.github.check_auth_status()
  1212→    submitted_by = username or "unknown"
  1213→
  1214→    # Detect draft-PR backend
  1215→    is_draft_pr = ctx.plan_backend.get_provider_name() == "github-draft-pr"
  1216→
  1217→    if is_draft_pr:
  1218→        # Draft-PR path: branch and PR already exist, just validate and trigger workflow
  1219→        user_output(f"Validating {len(issue_numbers)} draft-PR plan(s)...")
  1220→        user_output("")
  1221→
  1222→        validated_draft_prs: list[ValidatedDraftPR] = []
  1223→        for issue_number in issue_numbers:
  1224→            user_output(f"Validating PR #{issue_number}...")
  1225→            validated_pr = _validate_draft_pr_for_submit(ctx, repo, issue_number)
  1226→            validated_draft_prs.append(validated_pr)
  1227→
  1228→        user_output("")
  1229→        user_output(
  1230→            click.style("✓", fg="green") + f" All {len(validated_draft_prs)} plan(s) validated"
  1231→        )
  1232→        user_output("")
  1233→
  1234→        for v in validated_draft_prs:
  1235→            user_output(f"  #{v.number}: {click.style(v.title, fg='yellow')}")
  1236→        user_output("")
  1237→
  1238→        results: list[SubmitResult] = []
  1239→        for i, v in enumerate(validated_draft_prs):
  1240→            if len(validated_draft_prs) > 1:
  1241→                count = len(validated_draft_prs)
  1242→                user_output(f"--- Submitting PR {i + 1}/{count}: #{v.number} ---")
  1243→            else:
  1244→                user_output(f"Submitting PR #{v.number}...")
  1245→            user_output("")
  1246→            result = _submit_draft_pr_plan(
  1247→                ctx,
  1248→                repo=repo,
  1249→                validated=v,
  1250→                submitted_by=submitted_by,
  1251→                original_branch=original_branch,
  1252→                base_branch=target_branch,
  1253→            )
  1254→            results.append(result)
  1255→            user_output("")
  1256→    else:
  1257→        # Issue-based path: existing flow
  1258→        # Phase 1: Validate ALL issues upfront (atomic - fail fast before any side effects)
  1259→        user_output(f"Validating {len(issue_numbers)} issue(s)...")
  1260→        user_output("")
  1261→
  1262→        validated_issues: list[ValidatedIssue] = []
  1263→        for issue_number in issue_numbers:
  1264→            user_output(f"Validating issue #{issue_number}...")
  1265→            validated_issue = _validate_issue_for_submit(
  1266→                ctx, repo, issue_number, target_branch, force=force
  1267→            )
  1268→            validated_issues.append(validated_issue)
  1269→
  1270→        user_output("")
  1271→        user_output(
  1272→            click.style("✓", fg="green") + f" All {len(validated_issues)} issue(s) validated"
  1273→        )
  1274→        user_output("")
  1275→
  1276→        # Display validated issues
  1277→        for v in validated_issues:
  1278→            user_output(f"  #{v.number}: {click.style(v.issue.title, fg='yellow')}")
  1279→        user_output("")
  1280→
  1281→        # Phase 2: Submit all validated issues
  1282→        results = []
  1283→        for i, v in enumerate(validated_issues):
  1284→            if len(validated_issues) > 1:
  1285→                user_output(
  1286→                    f"--- Submitting issue {i + 1}/{len(validated_issues)}: #{v.number} ---"
  1287→                )
  1288→            else:
  1289→                user_output(f"Submitting issue #{v.number}...")
  1290→            user_output("")

  1292→                ctx,

  1294→                validated=v,
  1295→                submitted_by=submitted_by,
  1296→                original_branch=original_branch,
  1297→                base_branch=target_branch,
  1298→            )
  1299→            results.append(result)
  1300→            user_output("")
  1301→
